case_title: SILIM GOLDBERGER et al VS. DONG-KI LEE et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ELIZAVETA LEBEDEVA, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-02-2010 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-17-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FEB-14-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-14-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2010 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiffs are each sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings not reported. (212)
